economic_notes: Nation has investments in Weave Development Limited Partnership (25%), K & K Forestry Operations Limited Partnership (50%), and joint ventures including Seyem Qwantlen Construction/Milestone Environmental Contracting West (51%), Jackson Ridge Project (50%), and Seyem Qwantlen/Matcon Civil Joint Ventures (51%). Economic development segment expenses were $5,538,371.
notes: Prior year figures are restated. A prior period adjustment of $15,711 was recorded in 2021. Accumulated remeasurement gains swung from ($2,130,561) to $858,807 due to $2,989,372 in unrealized gains on derivative instruments and portfolio investments. Complex consolidation includes 15 fully consolidated subsidiaries and 3 joint ventures accounted for by proportionate consolidation. Two investments (Weave Development LP and K&K Forestry LP) use modified equity method. Current liabilities calculated as bank indebtedness ($693,655) plus accounts payable and accrued liabilities ($2,115,552). Expenses_social set to 0 as Health and Social Services reported together; health figure used for expenses_health. Member and Community Services expenses ($531,518) and Lands and Resources ($4,164,506) not mapped to standard categories.
